meaning: [建]怪兽状滴水嘴,(突出的)怪兽饰
examples: One of the men asked, as hunched and withered as a gargoyle.
Maybe I should ask the gargoyle. He doesn't seem to speak English.
Flanking this are statues of their beast forms: the griffin and the gargoyle.
Strap a gargoyle on the corner and you would think you were in baroque Europe.
The best songs here, like this one, Walking My Gargoyle, live up to that gloom-pop name.
